title: Assistant Store Manager - Dulux Decorator Centre - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Dulux Decorator Centre - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
